diagrams.title: Distributed System Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the layered architecture of distributed systems showing hardware, OS, middleware, and application layers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the architectural components and how they interact in a distributed system

diagrams.title: Client-Server Interaction Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the request-response flow between client and server in distributed systems
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how services are requested and delivered in client-server architecture

diagrams.title: Clock Synchronization using NTP
diagrams.description: Shows hierarchical NTP architecture with primary servers, secondary servers, and client nodes
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how clocks are synchronized across distributed nodes

diagrams.title: Distributed Mutual Exclusion - Token Ring
diagrams.description: Shows token passing algorithm where token circulates among processes in a logical ring
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how mutual exclusion is achieved without centralized coordinator
